<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>A.C.T.S Commercial Diagnostic – Commercial Impact</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Ubuntu:wght@400;500;700&family=Ubuntu+Condensed&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --navy:    #303841;
    --navy-deep: #222930;
    --navy-card: #3a434e;
    --navy-card2: #424d59;
    --orange:  #ff5722;
    --orange-light: #ff7043;
    --light:   #eeeeee;
    --text:    #eeeeee;
    --muted:   #9eaab5;
    --border:  rgba(255,87,34,0.22);
    --green:   #4CAF7D;
    --amber:   #F5A623;
    --red:     #E85252;
  }
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body { background:var(--navy); color:var(--text); font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-weight:400; line-height:1.6; }

  /* ── COVER ── */
  .cover {
    min-height:100vh; background:linear-gradient(160deg, var(--navy-deep) 0%, var(--navy) 100%);
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .cover::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; top:-180px; right:-180px;
    width:680px; height:680px;
    background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,87,34,0.11) 0%,transparent 68%);
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .cover::after {
    content:''; position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0;
    height:4px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--orange),var(--orange-light),transparent);
  }
  .cover-header {
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
    padding:36px 60px; border-bottom:2px solid var(--orange);
    background:#eeeeee;
  }
  .logo-mark img { height:56px; width:auto; display:block; }
  .cover-tag {
    background:transparent; border:2px solid var(--orange);
    color:var(--orange); font-size:11px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase;
    padding:6px 16px; border-radius:4px; font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-weight:700;
  }

  .cover-body { flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; padding:60px; }
  .cover-eyebrow {
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:4px;
    text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--orange); margin-bottom:24px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px;
  }
  .cover-eyebrow::before { content:''; display:block; width:40px; height:2px; background:var(--orange); }
  .cover-title {
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(52px,7vw,88px);
    font-weight:700; line-height:0.92; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:-2px; margin-bottom:28px;
  }
  .cover-title .highlight { color:var(--orange); }
  .cover-subtitle { font-size:17px; color:var(--muted); max-width:540px; line-height:1.7; margin-bottom:56px; }

  .cover-meta-grid {
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:2px;
    max-width:720px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .cover-meta-item { background:var(--navy-card); padding:24px 28px; border-right:1px solid var(--border); }
  .cover-meta-item:last-child { border-right:none; }
  .cover-meta-label { font-size:11px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:8px; }
  .cover-meta-value { font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:19px; font-weight:700; }
  .cover-meta-value.orange { color:var(--orange); }

  .cover-footer {
    padding:32px 60px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
    border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .cover-footer-note { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); max-width:500px; }

  /* ── SECTIONS ── */
  .section { padding:72px 60px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(238,238,238,0.06); }
  .section-header { display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:20px; margin-bottom:48px; }
  .section-number { font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:72px; font-weight:700; color:rgba(255,87,34,0.13); line-height:1; margin-top:-6px; flex-shrink:0; }
  .section-eyebrow { font-size:11px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--orange); margin-bottom:8px; }
  .section-title { font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:38px; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:-1px; line-height:1; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .section-desc { color:var(--muted); font-size:15px; max-width:580px; }

  /* ── SCORE HERO ── */
  .score-hero { display:grid; grid-template-columns:280px 1fr; gap:48px; align-items:center; }
  .score-circle { width:240px; height:240px; position:relative; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
  .score-circle svg { position:absolute; top:0; left:0; transform:rotate(-90deg); }
  .score-circle-inner { text-align:center; z-index:1; }
  .score-number { font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:64px; font-weight:700; color:var(--orange); line-height:1; }
  .score-denom { font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:22px; font-weight:500; color:var(--muted); }
  .score-label { font-size:11px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--muted); margin-top:4px; }
  .score-grade {
    display:inline-block; background:rgba(255,87,34,0.15); border:1px solid var(--orange);
    color:var(--orange); font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-weight:700;
    font-size:13px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:4px 14px;
    border-radius:4px; margin-top:12px;
  }
  .score-narrative { font-size:15px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.8; }
  .score-narrative strong { color:var(--text); }

  /* ── PILLAR BARS ── */
  .pillar-bars { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0; margin-top:40px; border:1px solid rgba(238,238,238,0.07); border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden; }
  .pillar-row {
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:48px 160px 1fr 70px 80px;
    gap:0; align-items:stretch; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(238,238,238,0.04);
  }
  .pillar-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
  .pillar-row:nth-child(even) { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.015); }
  .pr-letter {
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:24px; color:var(--orange);
    border-right:1px solid rgba(238,238,238,0.05);
  }
  .pr-name {
    display:flex; align-items:center; padding:20px 20px;
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:16px;
    text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;
    border-right:1px solid rgba(238,238,238,0.05);
  }
  .pr-bar-cell { display:flex; align-items:center; padding:20px 24px; border-right:1px solid rgba(238,238,238,0.05); }
  .pr-bar-track { flex:1; height:8px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden; }
  .pr-bar-fill { height:100%; border-radius:4px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--orange),var(--orange-light)); }
  .pr-score {
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:21px; color:var(--text);
    border-right:1px solid rgba(238,238,238,0.05);
  }
  .pr-status { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:0 16px; }
  .status-pill {
    font-size:10px; letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700;
    padding:4px 10px; border-radius:4px; white-space:nowrap;
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif;
  }
  .status-pill.strong { background:rgba(76,175,125,0.12); color:var(--green); border:1px solid rgba(76,175,125,0.3); }
  .status-pill.developing { background:rgba(245,166,35,0.12); color:var(--amber); border:1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.3); }
  .status-pill.weak { background:rgba(232,82,82,0.12); color:var(--red); border:1px solid rgba(232,82,82,0.3); }

  /* ── HIGHLIGHT STRIP ── */
  .highlight-strip {
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:2px;
    border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:48px;
  }
  .hs-panel { background:var(--navy-card); padding:32px 36px; }
  .hs-panel:first-child { border-right:1px solid var(--border); }
  .hs-label {
    font-size:11px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700;
    margin-bottom:20px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
  }
  .hs-label.green { color:var(--green); }
  .hs-label.red { color:var(--red); }
  .hs-label::before { content:''; width:28px; height:2px; }
  .hs-label.green::before { background:var(--green); }
  .hs-label.red::before { background:var(--red); }
  .hs-item { display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px; margin-bottom:16px; }
  .hs-item:last-child { margin-bottom:0; }
  .hs-dot { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; flex-shrink:0; margin-top:7px; }
  .hs-dot.green { background:var(--green); }
  .hs-dot.red { background:var(--red); }
  .hs-item-text { font-size:14px; line-height:1.6; color:var(--text); }
  .hs-item-sub { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); margin-top:2px; }

  /* ── RISK CARDS ── */
  .risk-grid { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px; }
  .risk-card {
    background:var(--navy-card); border:1px solid rgba(238,238,238,0.06);
    border-left:4px solid var(--red); border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;
    padding:28px 32px; display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:56px 1fr auto; gap:24px; align-items:center;
  }
  .risk-rank {
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:52px; font-weight:700;
    color:rgba(232,82,82,0.18); line-height:1; text-align:center;
  }
  .risk-content {}
  .risk-area { font-size:11px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--red); margin-bottom:6px; font-weight:600; }
  .risk-title { font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:20px; font-weight:700; line-height:1.2; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .risk-desc { font-size:13px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.6; }
  .risk-stat {
    background:rgba(232,82,82,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(232,82,82,0.2);
    border-radius:10px; padding:16px 20px; text-align:center; min-width:160px;
  }
  .risk-stat-num { font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:32px; font-weight:700; color:var(--red); line-height:1; margin-bottom:4px; }
  .risk-stat-label { font-size:11px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.4; }

  /* ── BLURRED TEASER ── */
  .teaser-section { padding:72px 60px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  .teaser-section::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; bottom:0;
    background:linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, var(--navy) 60%);
    z-index:2; pointer-events:none;
  }
  .teaser-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:16px; filter:blur(6px); opacity:0.4; user-select:none; }
  .teaser-card { background:var(--navy-card); border-radius:12px; padding:28px; }
  .teaser-card-title { font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:19px; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:12px; }
  .teaser-card-body { font-size:13px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.6; }
  .teaser-label {
    position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    z-index:3; text-align:center;
  }
  .teaser-lock { font-size:48px; display:block; margin-bottom:16px; }
  .teaser-label-text {
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:26px; font-weight:700;
    text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; color:var(--text); margin-bottom:8px;
  }
  .teaser-label-sub { font-size:14px; color:var(--muted); }

  /* ── CTA ── */
  .cta-section {
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,87,34,0.11) 0%, rgba(255,87,34,0.04) 100%);
    border-top:1px solid var(--border); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    padding:72px 60px;
  }
  .cta-inner { max-width:760px; margin:0 auto; text-align:center; }
  .cta-eyebrow {
    font-size:11px; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--orange);
    margin-bottom:20px; font-weight:600;
  }
  .cta-title {
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(38px,5vw,58px);
    font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:-1px; line-height:1;
    margin-bottom:20px;
  }
  .cta-subtitle { font-size:16px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.7; margin-bottom:48px; max-width:560px; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; }

  .cta-what-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:16px; margin-bottom:48px; text-align:left; }
  .cta-what-item { background:rgba(238,238,238,0.03); border:1px solid rgba(238,238,238,0.08); border-radius:10px; padding:20px 22px; }
  .cta-what-icon { font-size:24px; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .cta-what-title { font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:6px; }
  .cta-what-desc { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.5; }

  .cta-btn-group { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:16px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .btn-primary {
    background:var(--orange); color:white; border:none;
    padding:16px 40px; border-radius:10px;
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:17px;
    letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer;
    text-decoration:none; display:inline-block; transition:background 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background:var(--orange-light); }
  .btn-secondary {
    background:transparent; color:var(--text);
    border:1px solid rgba(238,238,238,0.22);
    padding:16px 32px; border-radius:10px;
    font-family:'Ubuntu',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:15px;
    letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer;
    text-decoration:none; display:inline-block;
  }
  .cta-note { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); margin-top:20px; }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  .page-footer {
    padding:36px 60px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
    border-top:1px solid var(--border);
    background:var(--navy-deep);
  }
  .footer-logo img { height:36px; width:auto; }
  .footer-contact { font-size:13px; color:var(--muted); }
  .footer-contact a { color:var(--orange); text-decoration:none; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- COVER -->
<div class="cover">
  <div class="cover-header">
    <div class="logo-mark">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Commercial Impact logo">
    </div>
    <div class="cover-tag">Complimentary Diagnostic</div>
  </div>

  <div class="cover-body">
    <div class="cover-eyebrow">Your A.C.T.S Commercial Diagnostic</div>
    <div class="cover-title">
      Know Your<br>
      <span class="highlight">Commercial</span><br>
      Gaps.
    </div>
    <div class="cover-subtitle">
      Based on your 40-point A.C.T.S assessment, this report surfaces the commercial challenges most likely to be limiting your growth — and the risks of leaving them unaddressed.
    </div>

    <div class="cover-meta-grid">
      <div class="cover-meta-item">
        <div class="cover-meta-label">Company</div>
        <div class="cover-meta-value">Acme Petfoods Ltd</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cover-meta-item">
        <div class="cover-meta-label">Respondent</div>
        <div class="cover-meta-value">Sarah Johnson</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cover-meta-item">
        <div class="cover-meta-label">Overall Score</div>
        <div class="cover-meta-value orange">96 / 200</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cover-meta-item">
        <div class="cover-meta-label">Maturity Level</div>
        <div class="cover-meta-value orange">Developing</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cover-footer">
    <div class="cover-footer-note">
      This complimentary diagnostic is prepared exclusively for Acme Petfoods Ltd and kept strictly confidential. It represents the first stage of your A.C.T.S commercial assessment. A full in-depth report is available as part of a paid advisory session.
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SCORE + PILLAR OVERVIEW -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-number">01</div>
    <div class="section-title-block">
      <div class="section-eyebrow">Where You Stand</div>
      <div class="section-title">Your Overall Score</div>
      <div class="section-desc">Your headline A.C.T.S score and how your commercial capability breaks down across the four pillars.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="score-hero">
    <div>
      <div class="score-circle">
        <svg width="240" height="240" viewBox="0 0 240 240">
          <circle cx="120" cy="120" r="100" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" stroke-width="14"/>
          <!-- 96/200 = 48% → 2π×100=628.3 → 628.3×0.48=301.6 -->
          <circle cx="120" cy="120" r="100" fill="none" stroke="url(#sg2)" stroke-width="14"
                  stroke-dasharray="301.6 628.3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
          <defs>
            <linearGradient id="sg2" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
              <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ff5722"/>
              <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ff7043"/>
            </linearGradient>
          </defs>
        </svg>
        <div class="score-circle-inner">
          <div class="score-number">96</div>
          <div class="score-denom">/ 200</div>
          <div class="score-label">Total Score</div>
          <div class="score-grade">Developing</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="score-narrative">
      Your overall score of <strong>96 out of 200</strong> places you in the <strong>Developing</strong> tier — the second of four maturity levels (Foundation → Developing → Established → Leading).<br><br>
      This means your business has some commercial fundamentals in place, but significant gaps remain that are likely costing you <strong>margin, listings, and long-term partnership value</strong> right now. The pillar breakdown below shows where those gaps are concentrated.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pillar-bars" style="margin-top:48px;">
    <div class="pillar-row">
      <div class="pr-letter">A</div>
      <div class="pr-name">Assess</div>
      <div class="pr-bar-cell"><div class="pr-bar-track"><div class="pr-bar-fill" style="width:44%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="pr-score">22/50</div>
      <div class="pr-status"><span class="status-pill developing">Developing</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar-row">
      <div class="pr-letter">C</div>
      <div class="pr-name">Commercialise</div>
      <div class="pr-bar-cell"><div class="pr-bar-track"><div class="pr-bar-fill" style="width:58%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="pr-score">29/50</div>
      <div class="pr-status"><span class="status-pill developing">Developing</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar-row">
      <div class="pr-letter">T</div>
      <div class="pr-name">Transform</div>
      <div class="pr-bar-cell"><div class="pr-bar-track"><div class="pr-bar-fill" style="width:40%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="pr-score">20/50</div>
      <div class="pr-status"><span class="status-pill weak">Needs Focus</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar-row">
      <div class="pr-letter">S</div>
      <div class="pr-name">Sustain</div>
      <div class="pr-bar-cell"><div class="pr-bar-track"><div class="pr-bar-fill" style="width:50%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="pr-score">25/50</div>
      <div class="pr-status"><span class="status-pill developing">Developing</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STRENGTHS + WATCH AREAS -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-number">02</div>
    <div class="section-title-block">
      <div class="section-eyebrow">The Picture</div>
      <div class="section-title">Strengths &amp; Watch Areas</div>
      <div class="section-desc">What the data says you're doing well — and where the warning signs are.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="highlight-strip">
    <div class="hs-panel">
      <div class="hs-label green">Where you're strongest</div>
      <div class="hs-item">
        <div class="hs-dot green"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="hs-item-text">Your pitch is adaptable and well-structured</div>
          <div class="hs-item-sub">Strong score on pitch flexibility across customers and channels — a genuine commercial asset.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hs-item">
        <div class="hs-dot green"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="hs-item-text">Good relationship depth with key accounts</div>
          <div class="hs-item-sub">You are proactively building contacts beyond the day-to-day buyer — protecting your listings.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hs-item">
        <div class="hs-dot green"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="hs-item-text">Commercially confident at 3-year horizon</div>
          <div class="hs-item-sub">Your team has a sense of direction and belief in its ability to drive growth — a strong foundation to build on.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hs-item">
        <div class="hs-dot green"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="hs-item-text">Customer segmentation is in place</div>
          <div class="hs-item-sub">You differentiate your approach by customer type — ahead of many businesses at a similar stage.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hs-panel">
      <div class="hs-label red">Areas requiring attention</div>
      <div class="hs-item">
        <div class="hs-dot red"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="hs-item-text">No standardised process for promotional ROI</div>
          <div class="hs-item-sub">Trade spend is being invested without a clear measurement of whether it's working.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hs-item">
        <div class="hs-dot red"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="hs-item-text">Selling story training is absent or informal</div>
          <div class="hs-item-sub">Inconsistent team capability is limiting your conversion rate at the buyer table.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hs-item">
        <div class="hs-dot red"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="hs-item-text">JBPs and QBRs are not yet embedded</div>
          <div class="hs-item-sub">Without structured partnership planning, key retailer relationships remain transactional.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hs-item">
        <div class="hs-dot red"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="hs-item-text">Team development and succession are underdeveloped</div>
          <div class="hs-item-sub">Skill gaps and talent risk are not being proactively managed — a vulnerability as you scale.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TOP 5 RISKS -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-number">03</div>
    <div class="section-title-block">
      <div class="section-eyebrow">Priority Risks</div>
      <div class="section-title">Your Top 5 Commercial Risks</div>
      <div class="section-desc">The five areas where your current gaps are most likely to be costing you — in margin, listings, and growth potential.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="risk-grid">

    <div class="risk-card">
      <div class="risk-rank">1</div>
      <div class="risk-content">
        <div class="risk-area">Assess · Pricing &amp; Profitability</div>
        <div class="risk-title">Trade Spend Without Measurement is Margin Destruction</div>
        <div class="risk-desc">
          Your promotional activities are not being systematically evaluated for ROI. This means budget is being committed to activities that may be generating volume but destroying profit — often without anyone realising. The issue compounds year-on-year as the same ineffective promotions are repeated.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="risk-stat">
        <div class="risk-stat-num">59%</div>
        <div class="risk-stat-label">of trade promotions fail to break even<br><em>— NielsenIQ / McKinsey</em></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="risk-card">
      <div class="risk-rank">2</div>
      <div class="risk-content">
        <div class="risk-area">Commercialise · Team Capability</div>
        <div class="risk-title">Inconsistent Selling Capability is Costing You Listings</div>
        <div class="risk-desc">
          Without formal training on how to build and deliver compelling selling stories, your team's performance at the buyer table is dependent on individual style rather than a consistent, data-led approach. Buyers notice — and it affects both new listings and the depth of investment they'll commit to your brand.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="risk-stat">
        <div class="risk-stat-num">48%</div>
        <div class="risk-stat-label">higher win rates using value-selling techniques<br><em>— Genius Drive</em></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="risk-card">
      <div class="risk-rank">3</div>
      <div class="risk-content">
        <div class="risk-area">Transform · Partnership &amp; Negotiation</div>
        <div class="risk-title">Transactional Retailer Relationships Cap Your Growth Ceiling</div>
        <div class="risk-desc">
          Genuine Joint Business Plans — built collaboratively with shared objectives — are not yet embedded in your key customer relationships. Without them, negotiations default to price and terms, your investment is seen as a cost of entry rather than a partnership, and your brand remains easy to delist when buyers face pressure.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="risk-stat">
        <div class="risk-stat-num">20%</div>
        <div class="risk-stat-label">higher service levels from collaborative JBP planning<br><em>— McKinsey</em></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="risk-card">
      <div class="risk-rank">4</div>
      <div class="risk-content">
        <div class="risk-area">Assess · Data &amp; Insights</div>
        <div class="risk-title">Decisions Made Without Data Lead to Costly Missteps</div>
        <div class="risk-desc">
          Your commercial data management is currently fragmented. Without a consistent approach to capturing, centralising and acting on both internal and customer data, strategic decisions rely on gut feel — increasing the likelihood of misaligned pricing, missed distribution opportunities, and slow responses to competitive threats.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="risk-stat">
        <div class="risk-stat-num">£12.9M</div>
        <div class="risk-stat-label">average annual cost of poor data quality to organisations<br><em>— Gartner</em></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="risk-card">
      <div class="risk-rank">5</div>
      <div class="risk-content">
        <div class="risk-area">Sustain · Team &amp; Talent</div>
        <div class="risk-title">Talent Risk is a Commercial Risk You're Not Managing</div>
        <div class="risk-desc">
          Formal coaching plans and succession planning for key commercial roles are not in place. This creates a fragile team structure where the departure of one or two individuals could cause significant disruption to retailer relationships and commercial continuity — particularly damaging during critical trading periods or negotiations.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="risk-stat">
        <div class="risk-stat-num">2×</div>
        <div class="risk-stat-label">annual salary — average cost of replacing a commercial team member<br><em>— DePaul University</em></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- TEASER / LOCKED CONTENT -->
<div class="teaser-section">
  <div class="teaser-grid">
    <div class="teaser-card">
      <div class="teaser-card-title">Question-Level Analysis</div>
      <div class="teaser-card-body">Deep dive into all 40 questions with individual scores, benchmarks and prioritised next actions for each area.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="teaser-card">
      <div class="teaser-card-title">Capability Theme Breakdown</div>
      <div class="teaser-card-body">How you score across 6 capability themes including Pricing &amp; Profitability, Negotiation, and Team Development.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="teaser-card">
      <div class="teaser-card-title">Prioritised Action Roadmap</div>
      <div class="teaser-card-body">A ranked, practical action plan with specific next steps for your highest-impact improvement areas.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="teaser-card">
      <div class="teaser-card-title">Industry Benchmark Comparison</div>
      <div class="teaser-card-body">See how your scores compare to peer businesses across each pillar — and where the competitive opportunity lies.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="teaser-label">
    <span class="teaser-lock">🔒</span>
    <div class="teaser-label-text">Full Report Available</div>
    <div class="teaser-label-sub">Included in your in-depth advisory session</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="cta-section">
  <div class="cta-inner">
    <div class="cta-eyebrow">Ready to Go Deeper?</div>
    <div class="cta-title">Book Your Full<br>Report Session</div>
    <div class="cta-subtitle">
      A focused 2-hour session where we walk through your complete 40-point results, build a prioritised action plan, and identify the highest-value opportunities to drive profitable growth.
    </div>

    <div class="cta-what-grid">
      <div class="cta-what-item">
        <div class="cta-what-icon">📊</div>
        <div class="cta-what-title">Full 40-Point Report</div>
        <div class="cta-what-desc">Complete question-level analysis with scores, benchmarks, and prioritised recommendations.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cta-what-item">
        <div class="cta-what-icon">🎯</div>
        <div class="cta-what-title">Action Planning Session</div>
        <div class="cta-what-desc">2 hours with Rich to build a practical, sequenced improvement roadmap tailored to your business.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cta-what-item">
        <div class="cta-what-icon">📈</div>
        <div class="cta-what-title">Benchmark Positioning</div>
        <div class="cta-what-desc">Understand how you compare to industry peers and where competitive advantage can be unlocked.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="cta-btn-group">
      <a class="btn-primary" href="mailto:rich@commercialimpact.co.uk?subject=ACTS Full Report Session">Book Your Session Now</a>
      <a class="btn-secondary" href="mailto:rich@commercialimpact.co.uk">Send Us a Message</a>
    </div>
    <div class="cta-note">rich@commercialimpact.co.uk · commercialimpact.co.uk</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-footer">
  <div class="footer-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Commercial Impact">
  </div>
  <div class="footer-contact">© 2026 Commercial Impact Solutions Ltd · <a href="mailto:rich@commercialimpact.co.uk">rich@commercialimpact.co.uk</a></div>
</div>

</body>
</html>
